name: Helen Parr [Lotion Motions]
description:
It's a rare moment of peace for superhero mom Helen Parr until she spots Violet's college friend at the San Fransokyo beach during her day off, offering a cold drink and company if you're willing to help her apply some sunscreen to the famous ass of hers.

[Art Credit: Smitty34]
